heading: Availability of funds
label: 6280 Availability of funds
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , War and National Defense, prior to repeal by .section 2749 of Title 50Pub. L. 119–60, § 3111(b)(1)

children.heading: .—In General
children.label: a .—In General
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), amounts appropriated pursuant to a DOE national security authorization for operation and maintenance or for plant projects may, when so specified in an appropriations Act, remain available until expended.

children.heading: .—Exception for Program Direction Funds
children.label: b .—Exception for Program Direction Funds
children.text: Amounts appropriated for program direction pursuant to a DOE national security authorization for a fiscal year shall remain available to be obligated only until the end of that fiscal year.
